name: RDS Multi-AZ Failover Configuration
description: Enable Multi-AZ deployment for RDS database to improve availability and durability

template.description: Enabling Multi-AZ deployment for {{dbEngine}} RDS instance ({{instanceType}}) with {{storageSize}}GB storage. Currently single-AZ deployment with {{connectionCount}} average connections. Multi-AZ will provide automatic failover capability with synchronous replication to standby instance.
template.currentState: Single-AZ RDS {{dbEngine}} instance ({{instanceType}}) in us-east-1a. {{storageSize}}GB gp3 storage. Automated backups enabled with 7-day retention. {{connectionCount}} average connections from application tier.
template.proposedState: Multi-AZ RDS deployment with primary in us-east-1a and standby in us-east-1b. Synchronous replication enabled. Automatic failover configured with 60-120 second RTO. Same instance type and storage configuration.
template.trafficPatterns: Production database with 24/7 availability requirement. Peak load during business hours (8 AM - 6 PM). Mix of OLTP transactions and analytical queries. Critical for order processing and customer data.
